# Malcolm Xavier — malxavi.com

Senior product manager working on growth and data platforms in media, publishing, and streaming. AI-native builder. Based in Los Angeles, originally from New York.

## Key pages

- Resume: https://malxavi.com/resume — work history, skills, education, downloadable PDF
- About: https://malxavi.com/about — longer-form bio, interests, "what I'm into"
- Contact: https://malxavi.com/contact — Calendly, email, LinkedIn, GitHub
- Case studies index: https://malxavi.com/case-studies — long-form articles on Growth PM methodology, AI-native product development, and Claude Code workflows
  - https://malxavi.com/case-studies/basecamp-coffee — Growth PM artifact: diagnosing a collapsing loyalty program with Claude Code, shipping a working prototype
  - https://malxavi.com/case-studies/building-this-site — meta case study on shipping this portfolio in seven days with Claude Code as a build partner
  - https://malxavi.com/case-studies/architecture-under-contract — sequel to "Building this site": the same rendering contract tested against three completely different upstreams (Spotify OAuth, Letterboxd CSV + RSS, Serializd polite-client), with TMDB as the supplementary enrichment layer
  - https://malxavi.com/case-studies/user-interviews — work case study at User Interviews: occupational targeting on a two-sided UXR marketplace lifted Early Qualification Rate 15%; a separate UX-writing fix lifted re-recruitment 135%. Skills: two-sided marketplace mechanics, leading-indicator selection (EQR), funnel pre-qualification design, A/B experimentation cadence, re-recruitment from existing user base, occupational targeting.
  - https://malxavi.com/case-studies/muck-rack — work case study at Muck Rack: decomposing the content ingestion monolith into per-content-type and per-source microservices lifted average daily ingestion 350% YoY. Reframes the volume goal as a quality problem (timeliness, accuracy, connectivity). Companion to Malcolm's LinkedIn article on the six dimensions of data quality. Skills: microservices decomposition, content ingestion pipelines, data quality measurement (timeliness, accuracy, connectivity), defending scope against constant injection, technical PM in B2B SaaS, reframing leadership metrics (volume → quality).
  - https://malxavi.com/case-studies/people-inc — work case study at People Inc. (formerly Dotdash Meredith): reshaping a newsletter-migration mandate into a multi-year identity, registration, and onboarding roadmap across a 40+ brand network. Co-shipped surfaces, capabilities, and growth programs on a pilot-to-network rollout cadence; 33% YoY email revenue lift network-wide, with Follow This Topic (topical newsletters) as the flagship launch. Argues that personalization at network scale is an infrastructure problem. Tools: Digioh (onsite marketing), Iterable (email), Hightouch (reverse ETL), Customer Data Platform. Skills: pilot-to-network rollout, identity and onboarding infrastructure, data-flow re-architecture, stakeholder influence without authority.
- Music: https://malxavi.com/music — monthly Spotify playlists, curated by mood and moment
- Films: https://malxavi.com/films — full Letterboxd journal with prose reviews. Every film Malcolm has logged (741 entries) is reviewable per-page at /films/{letterboxd-slug}-{year}, with TMDB metadata (poster, genre, runtime, director) and a 0.5–5★ rating. Genre-scoped landing pages live at /films/genre/{slug} (e.g. /films/genre/horror) for long-tail discovery.
- Television: https://malxavi.com/television — full Serializd journal across three review levels: Show, Season, and Episode. Every reviewed show (152 entries, 717 reviews total) is detailed per-page at /television/{show-slug}-{premiere-year} with the full season-by-season hierarchy, TMDB metadata, and a 0.5–5★ rating. Currently-watching seasons live at /television/watching. Genre-scoped landing pages live at /television/genre/{slug} (e.g. /television/genre/drama).

## Contact

Email: malcolm@malxavi.com
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/malxavi/
GitHub: https://github.com/malcolmxavier
Calendly (30-min chat): https://calendly.com/malcolmxavier/product-chat-30

## Content notes

Malcolm is a Senior PM with technical depth (React, Node, TypeScript, SQL, BigQuery, Python, ETL) plus an MS in Law from Northwestern (data privacy and IP) and a BA in Theatre and Dance. Most recent role: People Inc. (Dotdash Meredith), building MarTech infrastructure for 22M+ users across 40+ brands. Earlier work at Muck Rack, User Interviews, and Fullstack Academy.

Case studies are long-form articles covering Growth PM methodology, AI-native product development, and Claude Code workflows. The site is a portfolio supporting a Senior PM job search in tech, media, and streaming.

Currently interviewing. Open to senior PM roles in media and streaming.
